calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-19-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: VickiGross.
Petitioner: Briana Kraus Boyd, present in pro per, was swron and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Ian Kraus Livengood.
Decree signed in open court.
